# ona_runner (Resource)

Manages a Gitpod runner.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ona_runner" "example" {
  name              = "my-runner"
  provider_type     = "RUNNER_PROVIDER_MANAGED"
  runner_manager_id = "<your-runner-manager-id>" # ona.com → Settings → Runners → ⋯ → Copy runner manager ID

  spec = {
    variant = "RUNNER_VARIANT_STANDARD"
    configuration = {
      region                           = "eu-central-1"
      auto_update                      = true
      devcontainer_image_cache_enabled = true
      release_channel                  = "RUNNER_RELEASE_CHANNEL_STABLE"
      log_level                        = "LOG_LEVEL_INFO"
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable runner name.
- `provider_type` (String) Runner provider type (e.g. `RUNNER_PROVIDER_AWS_EC2`, `RUNNER_PROVIDER_LINUX_HOST`).

### Optional

- `runner_manager_id` (String) Runner manager ID. Required for managed runners.
- `spec` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Runner ID.
- `status` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--status))

<a id="nestedatt--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec`

Optional:

- `configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--configuration))
- `desired_phase` (String) Desired runner phase (e.g. `RUNNER_PHASE_ACTIVE`, `RUNNER_PHASE_INACTIVE`).
- `variant` (String) Runner variant (`RUNNER_VARIANT_STANDARD`, `RUNNER_VARIANT_ENTERPRISE`).

<a id="nestedatt--spec--configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.configuration`

Optional:

- `auto_update` (Boolean) Whether the runner auto-updates.
- `devcontainer_image_cache_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the devcontainer build cache is enabled.
- `log_level` (String) Log level (`LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG`, `LOG_LEVEL_INFO`, `LOG_LEVEL_WARN`, `LOG_LEVEL_ERROR`).
- `metrics` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--configuration--metrics))
- `region` (String) Deployment region.
- `release_channel` (String) Release channel (`RUNNER_RELEASE_CHANNEL_STABLE`, `RUNNER_RELEASE_CHANNEL_LATEST`).

<a id="nestedatt--spec--configuration--metrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.configuration.metrics`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `url` (String)
- `username` (String)




<a id="nestedatt--status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `status`

Read-Only:

- `message` (String)
- `phase` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `version` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import ona_runner.example <runner-id>
```
